title: M.Sc Jobs 2026 – Junior Research Fellow (JRF)
shortInfo: Birla Institute of Technology & Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Junior Research Fellow (JRF). Candidates Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 10-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through BITS Pilani official website.

basic_details.job_title: BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Birla Institute of Technology & Science, Pilani
basic_details.short_information: Birla Institute of Technology & Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Junior Research Fellow (JRF). Candidates Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 10-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through BITS Pilani official website.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc / M.Tech./M.E. in Biotechnology/ Life Sciences with first division and cleared CSIR NET / UGC NET / DBT JRF BET
qualification.details: M.Sc / M.Tech./M.E. in Biotechnology/ Life Sciences with first division and cleared CSIR NET / UGC NET / DBT JRF BET.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the BITS Pilani JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 10th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have an M.Sc / M.Tech./M.E. in Biotechnology/ Life Sciences with first division and must have cleared CSIR NET / UGC NET / DBT JRF BET.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for the JRF position?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: What is the mode of application for the BITS Pilani JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is through email. Candidates need to send their resume and required documents to the official email address.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Junior Research Fellow will be as per DST norms.

faq.question: What is the selection process for the JRF role?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve an Online Interview.

faq.question: Is there any age limit mentioned for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Specific age limits are not detailed in the provided summary. It is advisable to check the official notification for precise age criteria.

faq.question: What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Junior Research Fellow is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification and website for BITS Pilani?
faq.answer: The official website is www.bits-goa.ac.in. The official notification link will be available in the Important Links section.

seo_tags: BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow Jobs 2026
